scope_boundary: finite authority-record proof, synthetic fixture-gate behavior, and one bounded six-project authority-tuple lifecycle only; no deployed authorization enforcement, protocol-security result, hardware-root evidence, historical-project reproduction, or source-derived support-state promotion
transition_reason: The repository now has exact source mappings for the System Boundaries claim, a synthetic authority-transition harness, a finite Lean authority decision envelope, a repository revocation trace, and a six-project authority-tuple lifecycle that joins principal, execution domain, scope, budget, trace, replay, grant, policy, revocation, target-owner approval, and protocol/hardware-root boundaries while rejecting nine mutations. Those artifacts strengthen the design discipline but do not prove deployed permission enforcement, runtime adapter safety, live revocation propagation, protocol security, hardware roots, or open-world completeness.
required_artifacts: revocation propagation tests across delegated and replacement contexts
adversarial confused-deputy probes against live tool wrappers
cross-domain runtime traces with independently observed effects and target-owner authentication
accepted upward evidence-transition review for any narrowed stronger claim
verification_command: python3 scripts/validate_authority_transitions.py && python3 scripts/validate_authority_tuple_lifecycle.py && (cd lean && lake build) && python3 scripts/validate_proof_artifact_audit.py && python3 scripts/validate_v1_status_snapshot.py
negative_results: Authority Lean predicates are finite-record predicates
runtime adapter enforcement and revocation propagation are not implemented
protocol-security controls are not hardware-root evidence
downgrade_triggers: claim text interpreted as deployed enforcement
promotion_burden: Move above argument only after the claim is narrowed to the specific artifact lane that actually passed, or after deployed permission enforcement, revocation propagation, and confused-deputy behavior are tested and reviewed with accepted evidence-transition records.
limitations: finite Lean records do not prove runtime enforcement
synthetic fixtures do not prove deployed tool-wrapper behavior
source mappings support architectural discussion but do not by themselves promote support state
no deployed cross-domain enforcement, authenticated target-owner service, or hardware-root evidence has been recorded
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; not an independent security, formal-methods, or source-interpretation audit
acceptance_blockers: no cross-domain target-owner authentication or hardware-root evidence
non_claims: does not promote System Boundaries above argument
does not prove deployed authorization enforcement
does not prove runtime adapter safety
does not prove confused-deputy resistance in a live system
does not establish protocol security or a hardware root of trust
